mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_purchaseInvoice
order by ${orderByClause}

update dbo.ops_purchaseInvoice
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{record.lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdPrice = #{record.stdprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
purchaseDate = #{record.purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
specMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
receiveWarehouseId = #{record.receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
hopeExportDate = #{record.hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},
inqNo = #{record.inqno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomiAnswerNo = #{record.shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deliveryFlag = #{record.deliveryflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hsCode = #{record.hscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
greenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=CHAR},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
locationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
vipCode = #{record.vipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
importFobPriceOriginal = #{record.importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
importCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
jpSplitVT = #{record.jpsplitvt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
operatorId = #{record.operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cnNo = #{record.cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
replyOrderNo = #{record.replyorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
replyOrderDate = #{record.replyorderdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
replyExportDate = #{record.replyexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},
qtyTrans = #{record.qtytrans,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
impdate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=DATE},
dlvModDate1 = #{record.dlvmoddate1,jdbcType=DATE},
dlvModDate2 = #{record.dlvmoddate2,jdbcType=DATE},
dlvModDate3 = #{record.dlvmoddate3,jdbcType=DATE},
dlvModDate1Time = #{record.dlvmoddate1time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlvModDate2Time = #{record.dlvmoddate2time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlvModDate3Time = #{record.dlvmoddate3time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reasonRemark = #{record.reasonremark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
transTypeMod = #{record.transtypemod,jdbcType=CHAR},
dlvAnswerNo1 = #{record.dlvanswerno1,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
dlvAnswerNo2 = #{record.dlvanswerno2,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
produceFactory = #{record.producefactory,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
produceHolon = #{record.produceholon,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
errdescription = #{record.errdescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
imDateTheory = #{record.imdatetheory,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
imDateInFact = #{record.imdateinfact,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
beginProduceDate = #{record.beginproducedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
barCode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
caseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sendTime = #{record.sendtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
serverremark = #{record.serverremark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
port_arrivedate = #{record.portArrivedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customs_date = #{record.customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_price = #{record.poPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
inspectionType = #{record.inspectiontype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
add3C = #{record.add3c,jdbcType=CHAR},
FacExpdate = #{record.facexpdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hopeReceiveWarehouse = #{record.hopereceivewarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
filePath = #{record.filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sendVersion = #{record.sendversion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
infoJson = #{record.infojson,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
src_delivery_time = #{record.srcDeliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transtype_fact = #{record.transtypeFact,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imDateTheoryAfter = #{record.imdatetheoryafter,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sub_code = #{record.subCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_assign_type = #{record.supplierAssignType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepareOrderNo = #{record.prepareorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detailStatusCode = #{record.detailstatuscode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
statusDescription = #{record.statusdescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

lineItem = #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

inspectionType = #{inspectiontype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
add3C = #{add3c,jdbcType=CHAR},
FacExpdate = #{facexpdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ordType = #{ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hopeReceiveWarehouse = #{hopereceivewarehouse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
filePath = #{filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sendVersion = #{sendversion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
infoJson = #{infojson,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
src_delivery_time = #{srcDeliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transtype_fact = #{transtypeFact,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imDateTheoryAfter = #{imdatetheoryafter,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sub_code = #{subCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_assign_type = #{supplierAssignType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepareOrderNo = #{prepareorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detailStatusCode = #{detailstatuscode,jdbcType=INTEGER},
statusDescription = #{statusdescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
